value:
What a magnificent show!
Victory is yours!

Goodness...
Not the outcome I anticipated.
Now that was a fight to remember!

Oh...
This defeat should serve as a lesson to win next time...
Great! Looks like I've got the hang of it!
I think I'm fine! I'll press on!
It seems that watching Domon do all of that fighting has paid off!
Comrade...! The fight has only just begun!
I can't lose! Not here, not now!

Those who have strayed from the path,
I shall show you the way!
Here I come!

You will not get away with this any longer!
I've had enough!
You've gotten more skilled in such short time!
You fell for it!
I-I'm not done yet!
Don't underestimate me!
If only I had more power, I wouldn't have suffered such humiliation!
An opening?! This is my chance!
Don't let down your guard! Here comes more!
Time to reveal my ace in the hole!
You must draw out all your strength!
I hope you're ready!
I'll provide support as best I can!
Seems that worked out!
Good... That did it!
See that...?! That's what Gundam Fights entail!
No matter how heavy the burden, I will carve a path out of here!
Let's do whatever we can!
So you came...! But I'm afraid there's no retreat now!
Let me show you a real fight!
Listen well! Ready yourself, then face me!

Pathetic...! Far too pathetic!
Unworthy, the lot of you!

You clumsy fool!
You're dead meat if you lose focus!
